channel.title: Murder By The Book
channel.description: Upcoming events for Murder By The Book

item.title: Hilary Davidson in conversation with Nishita Parekh
item.description:
Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

Hilary Davidson is the bestselling author of seven crime novels, including The Damage Done and Her Last Breath. Her fiction has won two Anthony Awards, a Derringer Award, and a host of other accola...

Event details

item.title: Martin Walker
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

After a long career working in international journalism and for think tanks, MARTIN WALKER now gardens, cooks, explores vineyards, writes, travels, and has never been busier. He divides his time be...

item.title: Gabbie Hanks in conversation with Stephanie Graves
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

Gabbie Hanks is a former librarian and now works in literacy for the government. She is an avid psychological suspense reader, and this is her debut novel. Stephanie Graves is the author of th...

item.title: Kimberly McCreight in conversation with Abby Dunn
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

item.title: Allison Brennan
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

ALLISON BRENNAN is the New York Times and USA Today bestselling author of over fifty novels, including the Lucy Kincaid and Max Revere series. She was nominated for Best Paperback Original Thriller...

item.title: Christina Dodd in conversation with Angelina M. Lopez
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005
